name: Chutney Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cheddar and cream cheese in a bowl.
2. Add the dry sherry, curry powder, salt, and finely chopped chutney to the mixture.
3. Blend well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
4. Turn the mixture into a serving dish.
5. Top with snipped chives if for an appetizer and serve with crackers.
6. If served as dessert, serve with fresh fruit to dip into the mixture.
